title: Domestic Violence Shelters * Mothers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Domestic Violence Shelters * Mothers 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Families with Children * Hispanic/Latino Community Men Mothers Women Women * Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline, support groups, and a variety of supportive services for survivors of intimate partner violence, sexual assault, stalking, and trafficking. Provides emergency shelter services, based on availability, for survivors. Also provides in-person response to the emergency room for sexual assault survivors and assistance with protective and stalking orders. Every person who contacts Klamath Advocacy Center gets five essential services for safety and independence: safety plan, risk assessment, needs assessment, resource information, and next steps. PO Box 1358 Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Shelter: Women and women with minor children who are survivors of domestic/intimate partner violence or sexual assault All other services: Survivors of domestic/intimate partner violence, sexual assault, dating violence, and/or stalking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 884-0390 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER
